styleLock: Supercell-style stylized 3D cartoon (Clash of Clans / Brawl Stars aesthetic): chunky proportions with oversized heads and stubby limbs, exaggerated hand-painted textures, soft painterly shading with a clear primary light source from top-left and warm rim light from the right, thick dark brown outlines about 2-3% of the subject width so the silhouette pops on any background, hand-painted normal maps suggested through the shading (no hard rim lighting, no cel-shading bands), subsurface glow on translucent bits. Palette: warm backyard colony — deep mossy greens (#1d3a1a, #2c4724, #3d7a2c), warm brass and gold accents (#ffd98a, #b97e1c) for highlights, soft earth browns (#3a2512, #6b4420) for outlines and woodwork, never pastel. Top-down 3/4 perspective around 30 degrees. Soft oval drop shadow directly under the subject, about 70% alpha, never a hard cast shadow. 128x128 transparent PNG (RGBA alpha=0 outside the subject), subject fills ~85% of the canvas centered, no background, no ground plane, no grass tufts, no text, no watermark, no border, no caption. Cohesive, production-grade game asset quality.

factions.Bees: lemon yellow with black stripes, gauzy wings
factions.Spiders: deep purple with neon green eyes

units.WorkerAnt: a cheerful worker ant, six legs, carrying a tiny leaf over its head, tiny backpack
units.SoldierAnt: a sturdy soldier ant, oversized mandibles, wearing a paper crown, confident stance
units.DirtDigger: a burly ant with comically oversized front claws for digging, goggles, stubborn expression
units.Forager: a fuzzy bee with a tiny satchel of nectar, cute wings
units.Wasp: a sleek wasp with a stinger, bandit mask over eyes, determined glare
units.HoneyTank: a round, armored bee draped in honeycomb plates, slow and imposing
units.ShieldBeetle: a tank-like beetle with a riveted metal shield carapace, small legs
units.BombBeetle: a cute beetle carrying a dandelion-puff bomb above its head, wide eyes
units.Roller: a muscular beetle rolling a dew droplet like a wrecking ball
units.Jumper: a jumping spider, fuzzy legs, cat-like alert pose
units.WebSetter: a spinner spider weaving a glowing silver web between tiny twigs
units.Ambusher: a camouflaged spider peeking from under a leaf, only eyes visible
units.FireAnt: a fierce fire ant with a glowing ember crest on her head, hot orange mandibles, aggressive stance
units.Termite: a pale termite with oversized wood-chewing mandibles, hungry determined expression
units.Dragonfly: a fast dragonfly scout with long tail, glassy wings, sleek hunting pose
units.Mantis: a sharp mantis warrior with folded raptorial forelegs, poised to strike, leaf-green armor
units.Scarab: a heavy jeweled scarab beetle with a polished shell, ancient regal look, sturdy body
units.MiniScarab: a tiny cute scarab hatchling with a glossy shell, nimble little legs, eager charge
units.NestSpider: a compact defender spider with extra spidery legs, tunnel-dwelling look, bright alert eyes

walkCycles.WorkerAnt_poseA: a cheerful worker ant carrying a tiny leaf and a tiny backpack, six legs clearly visible. Pose: LEFT legs forward, RIGHT legs back, body leaning slightly forward into the step. Single 128x128 pixel transparent PNG, subject fills ~85% of the canvas, centered, facing viewer at the same 30-degree top-down 3/4 camera as the static sprite. No background, no ground plane, no text.
walkCycles.WorkerAnt_poseB: the leg positions swap — RIGHT legs forward, LEFT legs back, body still leaning slightly forward into the step. The leaf, the backpack, the face, the body, the colors, and the shadow stay exactly as in the reference.
walkCycles.SoldierAnt_poseA: a sturdy soldier ant with oversized mandibles and paper crown, confident marching stance, six legs clearly visible. Pose: LEFT legs forward, RIGHT legs back, mandibles slightly forward, body leaning into the step. Single 128x128 pixel transparent PNG, centered, same 30-degree top-down 3/4 camera as the static sprite. No background, no ground plane, no text.
walkCycles.SoldierAnt_poseB: the leg positions swap — RIGHT legs forward, LEFT legs back, body still leaning into the step. The mandibles, the paper crown, the face, the body, the colors, and the shadow stay exactly as in the reference.
walkCycles.Wasp_poseA: a sleek wasp with bandit mask and stinger, hovering. Pose: wings UP at the top of the wingbeat, body slightly lower, legs tucked. Single 128x128 pixel transparent PNG, centered, same 30-degree top-down 3/4 camera as the static sprite. No background, no ground plane, no text.
walkCycles.Wasp_poseB: the wings swap to the bottom of the wingbeat — wings DOWN and angled slightly outward, the body a hair higher than in the reference. The bandit mask, the stinger, the legs, the face, the colors, and the shadow stay exactly as in the reference.

buildings.QueenChamber: a majestic glowing queen chamber on layered dirt mound, lit from within, throne-like silhouette
buildings.DewCollector: a shimmering dew drop suspended in a twig cradle, rain-catcher
buildings.MushroomTurret: a red-capped mushroom turret with a small cannon in the stem, white dots
buildings.LeafWall: a tall overlapping leaf wall woven with spider silk, organic ridge
buildings.PebbleBunker: a fortress of stacked river pebbles, moss in the cracks
buildings.LarvaNursery: a cozy domed nursery with glowing larva pods visible through oval windows
buildings.SugarVault: a wooden vault door with a giant sugar-cube lock, sprinkles around it
buildings.TunnelJunction: a clean carved earth tunnel entrance, multiple paths radiating out
buildings.DungeonTrap: a disguised pitfall covered with twigs and leaves, ominous shadow inside
buildings.AcidSpitter: a chunky pitcher-plant style acid mortar, swollen bulb full of glowing green acid, organic artillery silhouette
buildings.SporeTower: a tall anti-air mushroom tower with a puffball cap, spore vents, lookout silhouette
buildings.RootSnare: a one-shot root trap made from thorny vines and buried hooks, tense coiled silhouette
buildings.HiddenStinger: a stealthy tesla-like stinger turret disguised among leaves, hidden needle cannon, ambush posture
buildings.SpiderNest: a sinister underground spider nest with silk-wrapped eggs and tunnel openings, defender-spawner silhouette
buildings.ThornHedge: a dense reinforced thorn hedge wall, layered brambles with sharp spikes, defensive organic barrier

menuUi.ui-button-primary-bg: a Clash-of-Clans style game button background, rich brass gold gradient top-to-bottom, thick carved wooden border in warm dark brown (#3a2512), soft painted highlight along the top edge (purely lighting, NOT a 3D tilt), subtle inner glow. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed straight from the front with zero perspective, zero isometric tilt, zero foreshortening — the rectangle reads as a perfectly axis-aligned rectangle. Painterly but crisp, 256x128 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling (safe center region for stretching, corners hold the ornamentation). No text, no icons, no logos — just the button surface.
menuUi.ui-button-secondary-bg: a Clash-of-Clans style game button background in mossy forest green, deep green bottom to lighter leaf green top, thick carved wooden border in dark brown, top highlight painted on as lighting only (NOT a perspective bevel), subtle leaf-vein texture in the fill. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed perfectly straight-on with zero perspective, zero tilt, zero isometric angle — the rectangle is axis-aligned. Painterly finish, 256x128 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-panel-bg: a Clash-of-Clans style game panel / card background, wood-plank texture in warm deep brown tones, corners reinforced with brass rivets, painterly shading with soft inner glow at the top, dark around the edges like an aged signboard. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, straight-on camera, zero perspective, zero isometric tilt, zero foreshortening — the panel reads as an axis-aligned rectangle. 512x256 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling so the plank grain can tile the center. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-hud-bg: a Clash-of-Clans style horizontal HUD / top-banner background, deep forest-green leather with brass trim top and bottom, ornamental scrollwork corners in brass, thick painterly shading. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewed perfectly straight from the front with zero perspective, zero tilt — axis-aligned rectangle only. 512x96 pixels transparent PNG, designed to tile horizontally. The middle should be a plain enough texture that resource pills sit on top without visual clash. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-title-banner: a Clash-of-Clans style decorative title banner ribbon, warm brass / gold ribbon sash with carved wooden backing and leaf flourishes at each end, ornate scrollwork. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, viewer directly in front of the banner, zero perspective, zero tilt, zero isometric angle — the banner reads as a symmetrical front-facing shape. Painterly depth via lighting only, not camera angle. 512x128 pixels transparent PNG. Empty central area so the game title can be drawn on top. No text.
menuUi.ui-board-tile-surface: a Clash-of-Clans style seamless grass / moss ground tile for a backyard colony game, hand-painted strict top-down (bird's-eye) view directly from above, zero perspective, zero isometric tilt, zero foreshortening — the tile is a perfectly flat top-down square. Mossy green (#2c4724 to #3d7a2c) with tiny pebbles, flower petals, dirt patches, painterly stylized not photographic, 128x128 pixels tileable PNG (edges match so the tile repeats seamlessly). Warm soft ambient lighting (no hard directional shadows that would imply a tilted camera). No text, no buildings, no characters — just ground.
menuUi.ui-resource-pill-honey: a Clash-of-Clans style rounded HUD chip that holds a honey droplet at its left end, warm brass rim around a dark wooden inset fill, glossy amber droplet with a soft highlight at the left. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective, zero tilt — axis-aligned rounded rectangle. 256x64 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling so the center can stretch to hold a number. No text, no numbers — just the frame and the droplet.
menuUi.ui-resource-pill-sugar: a Clash-of-Clans style rounded HUD chip with a white-and-blue sugar cube crystal at its left end, warm brass rim around a dark wooden inset fill, faceted crystal with soft icy highlights. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective, zero tilt — axis-aligned rounded rectangle. 256x64 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no numbers.
menuUi.ui-resource-pill-grubs: a Clash-of-Clans style rounded HUD chip with a rose-pink larva / grub pod at its left end, warm brass rim around a dark wooden inset fill, plump glossy larva with a soft subsurface glow. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective, zero tilt — axis-aligned rounded rectangle. 256x64 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no numbers.
menuUi.ui-icon-unit-frame: a Clash-of-Clans style circular portrait frame for a unit icon, a brass ring on a carved dark-brown wooden backing, subtle rivets around the ring, painterly shading, soft inner shadow so a unit sprite sits inside. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical circle, zero perspective, zero tilt. 128x128 pixels transparent PNG with a transparent hole in the center for the portrait to show through. No text, no characters inside — just the empty frame.
menuUi.ui-icon-building-frame: a Clash-of-Clans style rounded-square portrait frame for a building icon, brass border on carved dark-brown wooden backing, slight beveled shading (via lighting only, not perspective), painterly finish. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective, zero tilt. 128x128 pixels transparent PNG with a transparent hole in the center for the building portrait. No text, no buildings inside — just the empty frame.
menuUi.ui-badge-victory: a Clash-of-Clans style end-of-match victory banner: ornate gold laurel wreath embracing a shining five-pointed brass star, short painted ribbons trailing down at the bottom. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective, zero tilt. 256x256 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. No text, no characters.
menuUi.ui-badge-defeat: a Clash-of-Clans style end-of-match defeat plaque: a cracked dark carved-stone disk with a broken dull-iron sword tip across it, moss in the cracks, somber painted lighting. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective, zero tilt. 256x256 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. No text.
menuUi.ui-progress-bar-frame: a Clash-of-Clans style ornate horizontal progress-bar frame: a dark wooden trough with brass trim at top and bottom, scrollwork brass endcaps on left and right, a transparent hollow channel down the middle (so a fill bar can be drawn behind it). Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective, zero tilt — axis-aligned rectangle. 256x48 pixels transparent PNG designed for 9-slice scaling (endcaps hold the ornament, middle stretches). No text, no numbers, no fill color — just the frame.
menuUi.ui-tooltip-bg: a Clash-of-Clans style small painted tooltip / signpost background, a slim wooden plank with two small brass nail heads in opposite corners, warm painted shading, soft inner glow. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, zero perspective, zero tilt — axis-aligned rectangle. 192x80 pixels transparent PNG designed for 9-slice scaling. No text, no icons.
menuUi.ui-close-button: a Clash-of-Clans style circular brass close button: polished brass rim around a darker inset, a thick carved dark-brown X in the center, painterly lighting on the brass. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective, zero tilt. 96x96 pixels transparent PNG centered on the canvas. No text.
menuUi.ui-card-frame: a Clash-of-Clans / trading-card style ornate portrait-orientation card frame, warm brass / gold border with scrollwork corner flourishes, carved dark-brown wooden backing on the border itself, thicker ornamental top and bottom where a title banner and stats plate would sit. The central area is TRANSPARENT (cut out) so a card-specific portrait and body render behind it. Flat 2D asset rendered head-on, perfectly symmetrical, zero perspective, zero tilt, zero isometric angle — the frame reads as an axis-aligned rectangle. 512x720 pixels transparent PNG, designed for 9-slice scaling (the ornate corners + top + bottom stay un-stretched; the long straight edges stretch). Painterly depth via lighting only. No text, no characters, no icons inside the cutout — just the empty frame.
